task.title: Fix error responses leaking internal paths
task.description:
Security audit found that API error responses expose internal server paths and stack traces. Error responses must not contain file system paths, line numbers, or stack frames. Fix the error formatting to sanitize all internal details. Run the tests to verify your fix.

MINIMAL-EDIT BUDGET: this task scores a penalty if you change more than 30 lines total (added + removed across the unified diff). Edit only the offending lines in src/api/errors.js — do not rewrite the file or refactor surrounding code. Keep formatting and unrelated comments intact.

metadata.author: crucibulum-core
metadata.diagnostic_purpose: Tests whether agent sanitizes error output vs just removing one of the two leak vectors

known_scoring_limitations: Synthetic local fixture may not represent all production codebase variants.
